headline: Jay Morgan
body: Jay Morgan is set to complete a move to Chelsea.
text:
Jimmy-Jay Morgan has completed a permanent move to West Bromwich Albion.

Everybody at Chelsea wishes Jimmy-Jay the best of luck as he embarks on a new chapter in his career.
draft_caption:
OFFICIAL | Jay Morgan

Jay Morgan is set to complete a move to Chelsea.
